verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Glory, glory, glory to the Lamb! Glory, glory, glory to the Lamb! For He is glorious and worthy to be praised, The Lamb upon the throne; And unto Him we lift our voice and praise, The Lamb upon the throne.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Worthy, worthy, worthy is the Lamb! Worthy, worthy, worthy is the Lamb! For He is glorious and worthy to be praised, The Lamb upon the throne; And unto Him we lift our voice and praise, The Lamb upon the throne.
